notes:
## Cadente v0.2.91-beta.96

- Channel: `unstable`
- Commit: `2285489a`
- Changes since: `release marker: v0.2.91`

### Features
- add Automations tab with cron scheduler and permission fixes (`e60ed00`)
- inject cwd + file listing into HTTP provider system prompt (`82ce015`)
- tool loop for Ollama/OpenAI/DeepSeek/Gemini HTTP providers (`6c48008`)
- show local LLM memory usage (Ollama, llama.cpp, etc.) (`34fc5c7`)
- full auto-compact parity with Claude Code (`d9bc518`)
- add chat prompt queue (`d0b5aeb`)
- improve automation history and local reasoning (`bbed0ea`)
- track AI usage per account (`c2aa614`)
- source Claude models from models.dev (`07bf533`)
- add download buttons to update releases (`dad4557`)
- fork chat sessions from compacted turns (`b6ae47c`)
- generate release notes for public builds (`05d8358`)
- animate chronological compaction summaries (`8bdd7c7`)
- surface provider rate limit usage (`865e8c5`)
- Improve previews so files are easier to read across the app (`045eba4`)
- Show file previews beside diffs so reviews are easier to understand (`2285489`)

### Fixes
- preserve .Body and .Footer on memoized export (`b127fa7`)
- show -beta suffix in version when on beta channel (`c98a527`)
- guard get_app_version against double -beta suffix (`bbb52fd`)
- subscription accounts leaking into API keys section (`b0dde44`)
- use shieldCheck icon for subscriptions section, update comment (`c68bef9`)
- support o-series reasoning models (o4-mini, o1, o3) (`29ba805`)
- use developer role for system prompt on o-series models (`10f2eb1`)
- conditionally render API keys section header (`907e2b3`)
- restrict reasoning_effort to models that support it (`9ad483b`)
- correct tool loop bugs + fix Ollama tool call handling (`d101710`)
- stream response line-by-line instead of buffering entire body (`80f755d`)
- process content/tool_calls before done check; deduplicate opt_str_prop (`00d1359`)
- add Windows shell names to SHELL_NAMES for process identification (`8c83699`)
- skip Linux threads to prevent massive RSS overcounting (`d19215d`)
- two bugs in HTTP tool loop and Ollama stream (`3863da2`)
- rewrite to use HTTP provider system instead of Claude CLI (`23d2c44`)
- UX senior review fixes (`db0b987`)
- persist local models and improve model picker (`761dbcf`)
- keep dropdowns within viewport (`2dd4c29`)
- improve attachment previews and file browsing (`d1a7cb8`)
- add Claude Sonnet 5 to model catalog (`570e50a`)
- auto-discover provider models on refresh (`09b818a`)
- discover models for Claude CLI accounts (`9ad0ee5`)
- use current Claude CLI session for model discovery (`844ec26`)
- expose Claude CLI latest model aliases (`042c388`)
- clarify Claude CLI latest aliases (`fc60701`)
- show Claude CLI usage in AI widget (`af7500a`)
- prevent model dropdown clipping (`1bbc983`)
- prevent portal dropdown layout shift (`08de88e`)
- clean up AI usage widget accounts (`5abaf89`)
- run selected update downloads through updater flow (`dc820b7`)
- update updater release test fixtures (`aafd356`)
- gate AppImage updater code to Linux (`904a5f7`)
- send PR review prompt through stdin (`698065e`)
- make API discovery provider agnostic (`0af06aa`)
- prevent non-anthropic CLI fallback (`fbaac64`)
- make ai guardrails portable without ripgrep (`a972458`)
- keep generated release notes scoped (`a3b9025`)
- let public unstable generate release notes (`01b6fae`)
- repair chat compaction context tracking (`36d5b00`)
- stage updates until explicit restart (`69d94ae`)
- refresh context usage after compaction (`b6b851d`)
- load model catalog from models.dev (`5e4ccd1`)
- compute model comparison metrics dynamically (`0bac1c8`)
- harden shared model selector flows (`a6899a7`)
- compact Claude subscription via CLI (`b4c86be`)
- run auto compact for Claude CLI chats (`0394e7e`)
- Fix question mark typing in chat when terminal is hidden (`e28b088`)
- Improve change lists so base branches stay responsive (`576f30c`)
- Show compacted chats inline so people can review saved context (`d288a66`)
- Keep compacted chat previews clean for everyone (`3cf0811`)

### Performance
- virtualize long lists (`9167903`)

### Refactors
- cache registry with OnceLock, centralize HTTP_SAFE_TOOLS (`e62cfe6`)
- centralize Claude CLI turn spawning (`2c81993`)
- move tool protocol into providers (`89eded4`)
- centralize AI runtime resolution (`778e40c`)
- centralize context window resolution (`224beb7`)
- reuse shared model selector (`9ee4ea2`)
- centralize compact orchestration (`10c1ce2`)

### CI
- check macos intel target before push (`03c17f6`)

### Maintenance
- log public unstable resolve failure (`d94f748`)
- log public unstable mistyped sha failure (`135a2bf`)
- enforce global architecture guardrails (`bd68ba4`)
- run ai guardrails in critical preflight (`c8946ee`)
- add husky guardrail hooks (`ddfcb59`)
- centralize husky guardrail scripts (`ebac9a2`)
- Make release notes safer and easier to read (`6ecaa42`)
- Improve release notes so updates are clearer for everyone (`4385ba2`)
